title: Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) - Software
description: We are looking for passionate Graduate Engineer Trainees to join our core engineering team. You will undergo extensive training on full-stack web architectures and cloud systems before writing software for real-world enterprise projects. Ideal candidates have strong programming fundamentals and collaborative spirits.

title: Associate Data Analyst
description: Join our analytics group to assist in converting raw operations telemetry into dashboard-driven actionable business insights. You will write SQL queries, design beautiful visual BI displays, and clean tabular data payloads using Python and pandas.

title: Software Engineering Intern
description: AppScale is hiring Software Engineering Interns. Work alongside seniors to implement interface updates on our frontend portal. This is a 6-month program with high possibility of pre-placement offers based on project success.

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: WebCraft is seeking a Junior Frontend Developer. You will build user-responsive responsive landing grids and optimize web pages for maximum performance across varying desktop and mobile viewports.

title: Cloud Support Associate
description: Help our customers move their workflows to the cloud. You will troubleshoot network connectivity, deploy virtual instances, containerize legacy software using Docker, and script automation hooks using Python and shell commands.

title: Python Backend Developer
description: We are seeking a Python Backend Developer to scale our high-throughput data microservices. You will build robust endpoints using FastAPI, optimize SQL query execution, configure database migrations, and maintain cloud containers.

title: Data Engineer Intern
description: Build pipelines that collect and restructure telemetry data. You will design ETL jobs using pandas and Spark, schedule flows, and verify pipeline consistency against data schemas.

title: DevOps Intern
description: Automate all things! Work with our release engineering squad to build build-verification workflows in GitHub, containerize staging workloads, and audit cloud deployment access levels.

title: Junior Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are seeking an ML Engineer to build, evaluate, and deploy predictive models. You will clean datasets, conduct tabular analyses, configure validation loops, and wrap trained checkpoints inside live microservice frameworks.

title: Software Quality Assurance Engineer
description: Ensure the reliability and compliance of our applications. You will draft detailed validation test plans, write automated test cases using Selenium in Python, and verify UI workflows across multiple target platforms.

title: Graduate Petroleum Engineer
description: We are seeking a motivated Graduate Petroleum Engineer to assist in drilling operations, well log evaluation, and production monitoring. You will work on-site at our operations center to optimize hydrocarbon extraction processes.

title: Reservoir Engineer Intern
description: Join our reservoir engineering group to build numerical simulation grids and perform Decline Curve Analysis (DCA) to model reservoir depletion. Candidates with experience in Petrel/Eclipse simulation software are preferred.

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description: We are looking for a Mechanical Design Engineer to design high-precision automotive components. You will create CAD models using SolidWorks, validate structural integrity via FEA solver simulations in ANSYS, and prepare technical drawings utilizing GD&T standards.

title: Embedded Systems Developer
description: We are seeking an Embedded Systems Engineer to write micro-firmware programs, layout PCB designs in Altium Designer, and test hardware routing. You will program low-power microcontrollers and interface them with analog sensors for IoT network hubs.
